description_long: This is a two-story copy shop or print shop with a traditional European half-timbered architectural style. The building features a brown gabled roof, white and gray walls accented with exposed wooden beams, and a prominent balcony on the upper floor with wooden railings. The ground floor has an arched entrance and a sign reading 'Andre Shop' above the doorway, indicating its commercial function. The structure is elevated on one side, possibly to accommodate a sloped street or for architectural interest, and the lower portion is painted black. There are no visible window displays or printing equipment from the outside, and the overall appearance is clean and well-maintained.
description: A two-story, half-timbered copy shop with a brown gabled roof, wooden balcony, and a sign reading 'Andre Shop' above the arched entrance.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the brown gabled roof, white walls with wooden beams, and the elevated black base with no visible entrance.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main entrance with an archway, the 'Andre Shop' sign, balcony with railings, and detailed half-timbered facade.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the plain white wall, wooden trim, and the overhanging upper floor with minimal architectural detail.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the brown roof and the rectangular footprint of the building.
attribute_signage: A rectangular sign above the main entrance reads 'Andre Shop' in white text on a dark background, located on the front facade.
attribute_architectural_style: Traditional European half-timbered style, characterized by exposed wooden beams, white plaster infill, a gabled roof, and a prominent balcony with wooden railings.
